message.content:
Explore the overall theme, branding, and design system of this webapp. Look for:

1. CSS variables / theme definitions — check `client/src/index.css`, `client/src/App.css`, or any theme files
2. Font imports and typography choices (Google Fonts, local fonts)
3. Color palette used across the app
4. Common animation patterns (framer motion usage)
5. Glass morphism styling patterns
6. The sidebar design in Home.jsx for authenticated vs guest users
7. Any shared component library or design tokens
8. The Turnstile CAPTCHA integration and how it looks

Provide the full CSS variable definitions, font families used, and the overall design language/aesthetic of the app.
